text: REST endpoints SHOULD use plural nouns (e.g. /users) per Fielding's dissertation (Ch.5).
Idempotent methods (GET/PUT/DELETE) MUST be safe to retry; POST is not idempotent unless explicitly designed.

text: Pagination via cursor (opaque token) outperforms offset-based for large datasets — offset N requires scanning N rows.
Should error envelope follow RFC 9457 (Problem Details) or a custom JSON shape?
